title: luzula campestris var. australasica
intro: Luzula campestris var. australasica, also known as Australian woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Luzula campestris var. australasica is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
